instructions_to_main_agent: Use .js extensions (JavaScript) exclusively. Do not use .tsx files. Follow all data-testid rules for every interactive element. Build a responsive, clean enterprise SaaS UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components. Rely heavily on the provided color palette, typography guidelines, and layout rules to ensure a HubSpot-like professional aesthetic.
design_philosophy: Clean enterprise SaaS inspired by HubSpot. Prioritize role-aware hierarchy, top-left KPI priority, and functional color. Avoid heavy gradients and pure black/gray.

spacing_and_layout.grid: Control Room grid for Dashboard (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6). Dense and compact data correlation.
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8) for cards to prevent text collision. Tight gaps (gap-4) between related metric components.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Cards: flat white bg, 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), rounded-xl, soft shadow-sm. No heavy gradients.

components.navigation: Left Sidebar (collapsible) with deep navy (bg-slate-900 text-white) or clean white (bg-white border-r). Top header sticky with glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md) and z-50.
components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white rounded-lg transition-colors. Secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Left-aligned text, functional density. Use status badges for states.
components.forms: Shadcn Form/Input/Select. Multi-section forms use Tabs or a vertical stepper. Labels left-aligned or top-aligned.
components.timeline: Horizontal non-sequential stepper. Connected line, colored dots based on completion. Accessible via aria-labels.

login.layout: Split-screen. Left: Admin/Company login (navy/blue background with trust messaging/image). Right: Employee login (white background, clean form).

vendor_registration.layout: Centered card layout or 2-column if complex. Progressively disclosed fields.

dashboard.layout: Top band: 15-day free trial banner (bg-blue-50 text-blue-700). Next row: 5 Stat Cards (Total Clients, Pending Sites, Completed Sites, Total Installed KW, Subsidy Clients). Bottom: Recent Clients Table (last 10).

company_profile.layout: Two column layout: Left profile details, Right document storage grid.

clients_crm.layout: Full page table. Search and filter bar at top. Columns: Name, Mobile, Consumer Number, Address, System KW, Phase Type, Subsidy, Status, Progress %, Last Updated. Actions: View/Edit/Delete dropdown.

new_client_form.layout: 3-section tabbed layout. Client Details, System Details, Document Uploads.

client_details_view.layout: Header with client info and auto-generated ID (SOL-2026-XXXX). Center: 7-stage horizontal progress timeline. Bottom/Sidebar: Internal Notes with timestamps.

team_management.layout: List of employees. 'Add Employee' modal with Role selector and Matrix of page-level access control (View/Create/Edit/Delete/Approve checkboxes).

notification_center.layout: Popover from Bell icon in header. Unread badge. Grouped panels: Today, Yesterday, Older.

solar_sites.description: Black and white solar panels (can be used for hero/login background)
Person working on a solar panel (Installation context)

testing.attributes: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case and role-based (e.g., login-form-submit-button). This is mandatory.
